title: German Hash Beef Hash
description: A hearty, comforting German dish made with ground beef and crispy hash browns. Perfect for a cold winter evening.

ingredients.name: Ground Beef
ingredients.notes: 80/20 lean to fat ratio works best

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the hash browns to the skillet and cook until they are crispy and golden brown.
Add the beef broth to the skillet and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed.
Season the hash with salt and pepper to taste.
